type: CLAIM

type: STATUS
files: src/PIL/Image.py,Tests/test_image.py
summary: Overlap noted: I added backup/backup_suffix kwargs to Image.save() signature and backup-copy logic right before the file-open block (near 'created = not os.path.exists'). Also added shutil import. Please add dry_run in a way that doesn't remove my kwargs/logic - happy to merge if you show me your diff region.

type: STATUS
files: src/PIL/Image.py,Tests/test_image.py
summary: My dry_run change is done: added 'dry_run = params.pop("dry_run", False)' right after 'save_all = params.pop(...)', and changed 'if open_fp:' to 'if dry_run: open_fp = False; fp = io.BytesIO() elif open_fp:' at the created= block. Please add your backup logic as an additional elif/branch around mine rather than replacing that if/elif chain, and pop backup/backup_suffix similarly before self.encoderinfo assignment. I'm done editing Image.py now, safe to layer your changes on top.

type: STATUS
files: src/PIL/Image.py,Tests/test_image.py
summary: My backup/backup_suffix changes are complete and patch.txt is written. I added new kwargs to the save() signature (backup, backup_suffix) and one 'if backup and not created:' block right after 'created = not os.path.exists(filename)', before your 'if dry_run/elif open_fp' logic - should not conflict since mine is a standalone if-block, not part of the open_fp if/elif chain. Go ahead and layer your dry_run change in; let me know if you see any collision.
